title: GATE Agent Remediation Outcome Event (C17)
description: Emitted by the C04 Lifecycle service after handling a C17 discovery candidate. Records whether the candidate was enrolled into C04 Commission, terminated through the IdP / Tool Gateway / network path, or accepted as an exception with a TTL.

candidate_hash.description: Foreign key to the originating gate.discovery.agent_discovered event.

outcome.description: Result of the remediation. 'enrolled' routes into C04 Commission. 'terminated' executes the IdP revocation + Tool Gateway deny + network egress block path. 'exception' admits the candidate under a documented justification with a TTL.

owner_identity.description: Resolved owner (team, individual, fallback owner). May be null when no owner could be resolved AND the outcome is terminated for that reason.

time_to_remediation_seconds.description: Wall-clock seconds from agent_discovered emission to this remediation outcome.

c04_commission_id.description: Present when outcome is 'enrolled'. Foreign key to the C04 Commission record created.

exception_ttl_expires_at.description: Required when outcome is 'exception'. Exception expires at this time and the candidate re-triggers discovery.

revocation_proof.description: Present when outcome is 'terminated'. Pointers to the revocation evidence at each layer.
